plan: In django/db/models/fields/__init__.py, update Field.__eq__ (around line 519) to compare self.model alongside creation_counter (guarding for fields not yet contributed to a class via hasattr/getattr on 'model'), so fields inherited into different concrete models compare unequal. Update Field.__hash__ to hash a tuple of creation_counter plus the model's app_label/model_name, and update Field.__lt__ to order first by creation_counter and only fall back to model as a tiebreaker so existing orderings are preserved. Add regression tests in tests/model_fields/tests.py verifying that fields from two concrete children of an abstract model are unequal, hash differently, and order deterministically.
